epic.title: EVA Machine Trust Index
epic.description: Design and implement the EVA Trust Service — a stateless microservice that computes the Machine Trust Index (MTI) for every actor in the EVA Platform. Six independent subscores (ITI, BTI, CTI, ETI, STI, ARI) combine into a Composite MTI (0-100) that maps to a Trust Band. The Trust Band is the enforcement signal for the 19-ai-gov Decision Engine (step 5) and gates what actions 33-eva-brain-v2 may take autonomously. All frontend surfaces (31-eva-faces admin + chat + portal) consume the trust band for display and access control. Candidate runtime host: 29-foundry. All traffic through 17-apim with x-eva-* cost attribution headers. Observability via App Insights OTel. Evidence spine via 40-eva-control-plane.

features.title: E1 -- MTI Foundation: Scaffold, Auth, Cosmos, Data Model
features.description: YAML spec remediation (strip   HTML entities from eva-mti-compute-specs.md and eva-mti-trust-service-api.md). FastAPI Trust Service scaffold with Entra ID bearer auth, Cosmos DB client (actor_trust_scores), Pydantic models, health endpoint. Register 47-eva-mti project, 4 Trust Service endpoints, and actor_trust_scores container in 37-data-model. Dockerfile, ACR push (eva-trust-service:latest), Container App (marco-eva-trust-service), GitHub Actions CI/CD stub.

features.title: E2 -- Computation Engine: 6 Subscores, Formula, Decay, Bands
features.description: Six subscore calculators: ITI (identity strength), BTI (behaviour violations with exponential decay half_life=14d), CTI (compliance % controls/obligations), ETI (evidence pack completeness + SHA-256), STI (prompt injection + anomaly signals), ARI (hallucination rate + red team). Actor-type weight tables (HUMAN/AGENT/SERVICE/SYSTEM). Composite formula: clamped weighted sum. Trust band mapping at 5 boundaries. Missing signal penalty. SERVICE defaults ARI=100, SYSTEM defaults BTI=100. POST /trust/evaluateTrust live with p95<=150ms.

features.title: E3 -- Actor Trust History and Query API
features.description: GET /trust/getActorTrust/{actorId}: returns current composite MTI + 6 subscores. ?history=true returns 30-day time series. TRUST_READER role required (403 if absent). Unknown actorId returns 200 with defaults and UNTRUSTED band (never 404). actor_trust_scores records are append-only (no UPDATE or DELETE). Cosmos query with date range and continuation token pagination.

features.title: E4 -- Signal Ingestion Pipeline: Async, Dedup, DLQ
features.description: POST /trust/signal: 202 Accepted within 30ms. Signal types: BTI_VIOLATION, ARI_HALLUCINATION, ETI_VALIDATED, STI_INJECTION_DETECTED, CTI_CONTROL_FAILED, ITI_MFA_CHANGED. Async recompute queue (asyncio background task for dev, Azure Service Bus for prod). Score-update propagation within 60 seconds. Deduplication window 5 minutes (configurable). Dead-letter queue for malformed/failed signals. Signal pipeline failure must not crash the Trust Service.

features.title: E5 -- Decision Engine Integration (19-ai-gov)
features.description: POST /trust/getDecision: chains through the full 9-step 19-ai-gov Decision Engine pipeline and returns decision, obligations[], reasons[], and trustBand. correlationId round-tripped in every request/response. computationVersion stamped in response. DENY-safe circuit breaker: Trust Service unavailability causes calling system to apply DENY (not silent ALLOW). MTI snapshot stored in governance_evaluations (19-ai-gov) matches the score returned by evaluateTrust for the same correlationId.

features.title: E6 -- Signal Emitter Integrations (brain-v2, APIM, control-plane, rbac, red-teaming)
features.description: Wire all 6 signal sources to the Trust Service. 33-eva-brain-v2: BTI_VIOLATION from audit middleware; ARI_HALLUCINATION from evaluation telemetry. 17-apim: STI_INJECTION_DETECTED and STI anomaly signals from APIM threat policies. 40-eva-control-plane: ETI_VALIDATED signal when evidence pack SHA-256 validated. 28-rbac: ITI read from Entra ID token claims at evaluate time (not push). 36-red-teaming: ARI signal format agreed; Promptfoo evaluation results consumed by ARI calculator.

features.title: E7 -- Admin Screens (31-eva-faces): Trust Dashboard, Actor Profile, Signal Log, Config, Agent Fleet
features.description: Five new admin-face screens built with AdminListPage template, WCAG 2.1 AA, EN/FR i18n, jest-axe 0 violations, vitest tests. Trust Dashboard (/admin/trust/dashboard): score distribution + signal volume. Actor Trust Profile (/admin/trust/actors/{actorId}): 6-subscore bar chart + 30d sparkline + signal log. Trust Signal Log (/admin/trust/signals): paginated all-actor log + DLQ tab. Trust Band Config (/admin/trust/config): read-only thresholds + computationVersion history. Agent Fleet Trust Overview (/admin/trust/agents): AGENT actors sorted by band. All 5 screens + their API calls registered in 37-data-model.

features.title: E8 -- Trust Indicator UI: TrustBandIndicator Component, Chat-face, Portal-face
features.description: TrustBandIndicator shared component exported from @eva/ui: chip/badge with band label + colour, tooltip with 6-subscore breakdown, WCAG 2.1 AA (forced-colors, aria-label, keyboard accessible), Storybook story. Integrated in: chat-face ChatMessage (per-turn AI trust band), portal-face NavHeader / profile area (current user trust band), with link to actor profile if TRUST_READER role.

features.title: E9 -- Observability, FinOps, DevOps: OTel, Workbook, CI/CD, Cost Attribution
features.description: Full OTel instrumentation: span per /evaluateTrust with correlationId, subscore durations as custom metrics, signal ingestion volume + latency. KQL Workbook: 5 panels (score distribution, band transitions, signal volume, DLQ trend, p95 latency). APIM x-eva-* cost attribution on all Trust Service calls (project=47-eva-mti). FinOps: tagged costs visible in 14-az-finops Power BI. GitHub Actions CI/CD: test -> build -> ACR push -> Container App deploy. evidence_id (GH{run}-PR{pr}-{sha}) propagated to ACR tag, Container App label, ADO artifact. Azure Monitor alerts: availability < 99.5% and p95 > 150ms. Availability SLA: 99.5% over 30 days.

user_stories.title: [MTI-1] YAML spec remediation: strip   from eva-mti-compute-specs.md
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: Clean copy of eva-mti-compute-specs.md committed to 47-eva-mti/specs/. grep -c ' ' = 0. yamllint exits 0 on the YAML blocks.

evidence.notes: M-09 from PLAN.md. Source: 19-ai-gov/eva-mti-compute-specs.md.

user_stories.title: [MTI-2] YAML spec remediation: strip   from eva-mti-trust-service-api.md
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: Clean copy of eva-mti-trust-service-api.md committed to 47-eva-mti/specs/. grep -c ' ' = 0. yamllint exits 0. OpenAPI validator accepts the spec.

evidence.notes: M-09 from PLAN.md. Source: 19-ai-gov/eva-mti-trust-service-api.md.

user_stories.title: [MTI-3] Trust Service FastAPI scaffold: starts cleanly on port 8030
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: uvicorn trust_service.main:app --port 8030 starts. GET /health returns {status: ok, service: trust-service}. tsc and pytest clean (0 errors, 0 failures).

evidence.notes: FastAPI + uvicorn + pydantic-settings + structlog.

user_stories.title: [MTI-4] Entra ID bearer auth middleware on all Trust Service endpoints
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: GET /trust/getActorTrust/test without Authorization header -> 401. Valid token without TRUST_READER role -> 403 on getActorTrust. Valid token with role -> 200. Health endpoint bypasses auth.

evidence.notes: Use fastapi-azure-auth or custom Entra ID JWKS middleware.

user_stories.title: [MTI-5] Pydantic models: TrustEvaluateRequest, TrustEvaluateResponse, TrustSignalRequest, ActorTrustHistory
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: All 4 models validate correctly against the clean OpenAPI spec. mypy --strict passes on models module. Round-trip serialization test passes.

evidence.notes: Source: 47-eva-mti/specs/eva-mti-trust-service-api.md (clean copy).

user_stories.title: [MTI-6] Register 47-eva-mti project in 37-data-model (PUT + write cycle)
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: GET /model/projects/47-eva-mti returns 200 with id=47-eva-mti, maturity=poc. write cycle: PUT -> GET (row_version++) -> export -> assemble 27/27 -> validate exit 0.

evidence.notes: 5-step write cycle per copilot-instructions PART 1 section 3.

user_stories.title: [MTI-7] Register 4 Trust Service endpoints in 37-data-model
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: GET /model/endpoints/?project=47-eva-mti returns 4 entries: POST /trust/evaluateTrust, GET /trust/getActorTrust/{actorId}, POST /trust/getDecision, POST /trust/signal. Write cycle exits 0.

evidence.notes: Use exact endpoint IDs from clean OpenAPI spec.

user_stories.title: [MTI-8] Register actor_trust_scores Cosmos container in 37-data-model + provision in Azure
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: GET /model/containers/actor_trust_scores returns 200 with owner=47-eva-mti. Container exists in marco-sandbox-cosmos, eva-foundation DB, partition key /actor_id, 30-day TTL. Write cycle exits 0.

evidence.notes: Schema from 19-ai-gov/eva-api-n-cosmos-container.md section actor_trust_scores.

user_stories.title: [MTI-9] ITI calculator: scores identity strength from Entra ID token claims
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: Unit test: full MFA + ToU accepted + role_maturity_days >= 90 -> ITI >= 80. No MFA -> ITI <= 40. Missing ITI signal source -> unknown_signal_penalty applied. Score clamped [0,100].

evidence.notes: Inputs: mfa_registered, tou_accepted, role_maturity_days, token_strength. Spec: eva-mti-scope.md ITI section.

user_stories.title: [MTI-10] BTI calculator with exponential temporal decay (half_life=14 days)
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: Unit test: violation today vs 28 days ago -> today weight 4x higher (exp decay). Violation events stored raw with timestamps; decay applied at compute time (never pre-stored). Score clamped [0,100].

evidence.notes: Formula: weight(t) = exp(-ln(2)*t/half_life). Spec: eva-mti-compute-specs.md BTI section.

user_stories.title: [MTI-11] CTI calculator: compliance score from controls and obligations
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: Unit test: 100% controls met + 100% obligations fulfilled -> CTI = 100. 50% controls, 50% obligations -> CTI = 50 (weighted). Missing CTI signal -> penalty applied.

evidence.notes: Inputs: governance_evaluations (19-ai-gov), obligation_instances.

user_stories.title: [MTI-12] ETI calculator: evidence pack completeness and SHA-256 validation
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: Unit test: complete evidence pack with valid SHA-256 on all artifacts -> ETI = 100. Missing required fields -> deduction applied. Forged SHA-256 -> ETI = 0.

evidence.notes: Inputs: evidence_artifacts from 40-eva-control-plane.

user_stories.title: [MTI-13] STI calculator: prompt injection and anomaly signal scoring
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: Unit test: STI_INJECTION_DETECTED signal with severity=high -> STI drops by configured penalty. No signals in window -> STI = baseline. Score clamped [0,100].

evidence.notes: Inputs: APIM threat headers, App Insights anomaly detections from 17-apim.

user_stories.title: [MTI-14] ARI calculator: agent reliability from hallucination rate and red team results
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: Unit test: hallucination_rate=0.3 -> ARI <= 50. hallucination_rate=0.0 + passing red team -> ARI >= 90. AGENT with no ARI signal -> missing_signal_penalty applied. SERVICE -> ARI defaults to 100.

evidence.notes: Inputs: EVA Brain evaluation telemetry (33-eva-brain-v2), red team results (36-red-teaming).

user_stories.title: [MTI-15] Actor-type weight tables: HUMAN vs AGENT vs SERVICE vs SYSTEM produce different composites
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: Unit test: same input signals with actorType=HUMAN vs AGENT -> different composite MTI (ARI weight differs). SERVICE: ARI weight=0. SYSTEM: BTI weight=0. All 4 actor types tested.

evidence.notes: Spec: eva-mti-compute-specs.md weight tables section.

user_stories.title: [MTI-16] Composite MTI clamped [0,100] and mapped to correct trust band at all 5 boundaries
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: Boundary unit test: raw scores at 0, 29, 30, 49, 50, 69, 70, 84, 85, 100 all map to correct band (UNTRUSTED/LOW/GUARDED/TRUSTED/HIGH TRUST). Overshoot and undershoot values clamped.

evidence.notes: AC-T01-4 from ACCEPTANCE.md.

user_stories.title: [MTI-17] Missing signal penalty applied when required signal source unavailable
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: Unit test: remove ITI signal source entirely -> unknown_signal_penalty applied to ITI (not silent 0). missingSignals[] field in response lists the missing source. Composite MTI reflects penalty.

evidence.notes: AC-T01-6 from ACCEPTANCE.md. Critical: prevents trust inflation from data gaps.

user_stories.title: [MTI-18] SERVICE actor defaults ARI=100; SYSTEM actor defaults BTI=100
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: Unit test: actorType=SERVICE -> ARI=100 regardless of ARI signal input. actorType=SYSTEM -> BTI=100 regardless of BTI signal input. AC-T05-3 and AC-T05-4.

evidence.notes: AC-T05-3, AC-T05-4 from ACCEPTANCE.md.

user_stories.title: [MTI-19] POST /trust/evaluateTrust returns all 6 subscores, composite MTI, and trust band in every response
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: Response schema: iti, bti, cti, eti, sti, ari, compositeMti, trustBand, computationVersion, correlationId all present. Missing any field -> test failure. 10 integration tests covering all 4 actor types.

evidence.notes: AC-T01-1, AC-T02-1 from ACCEPTANCE.md.

user_stories.title: [MTI-20] POST /trust/evaluateTrust p95 latency <= 150ms under 100 concurrent requests
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: Load test: 100 concurrent requests -> p95 <= 150ms measured in App Insights or locust. Catalog cached between requests. AC-T07-1.

evidence.notes: AC-T07-1 from ACCEPTANCE.md. Measure after Cosmos read path is optimized.

user_stories.title: [MTI-21] GET /trust/getActorTrust/{actorId} returns current composite + 6 subscores
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: GET with valid actorId returns: compositeMti, iti, bti, cti, eti, sti, ari, trustBand, computedAt. TRUST_READER role required (403 without). Response time <= 100ms.

evidence.notes: AC-T02-2 from ACCEPTANCE.md.

user_stories.title: [MTI-22] GET /trust/getActorTrust/{actorId}?history=true returns 30-day time series
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: Response includes history[] array. Records from up to 30 days ago returned. Continuation token for pagination. Integration test with actor seeded with 10 historical records.

evidence.notes: AC-T03-2 from ACCEPTANCE.md.

user_stories.title: [MTI-23] Unknown actorId on evaluateTrust and getActorTrust returns 200 with defaults
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: GET /trust/getActorTrust/unknown-actor-xyz -> 200 with compositeMti computed from defaults, trustBand=UNTRUSTED. Never returns 404. AC-T06-2.

evidence.notes: AC-T06-2 from ACCEPTANCE.md. Critical for Decision Engine safety.

user_stories.title: [MTI-24] actor_trust_scores records are append-only: no UPDATE or DELETE allowed
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: Attempting to PATCH or DELETE a Cosmos record from the Trust Service returns an error. Integration test confirms record is unchanged after attempt. AC-T03-3.

evidence.notes: AC-T03-3 from ACCEPTANCE.md. Enforced at repository layer, not just policy.

user_stories.title: [MTI-25] POST /trust/signal returns 202 Accepted within 30ms
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: Load test: p95 acknowledgment <= 30ms for POST /trust/signal. Body: signalType, actorId, value, timestamp, source. 202 returned immediately; processing is async. AC-T07-3.

evidence.notes: AC-T07-3 from ACCEPTANCE.md.

user_stories.title: [MTI-26] Signal schema validation: malformed signals are DLQ-ed not silently ignored
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: Send signal with missing actorId -> 400 returned OR 202 + DLQ entry created. Signal with unknown signalType -> DLQ. Valid signal -> 202 + async processed. DLQ entry visible in operator log.

evidence.notes: AC-T04-5 from ACCEPTANCE.md.

user_stories.title: [MTI-27] Signal-to-score-update propagation completes within 60 seconds
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: Integration test: send BTI_VIOLATION signal -> poll GET /trust/getActorTrust every 5s -> score updated within 60s of signal receipt. AC-T04, AC-T07-4.

evidence.notes: AC-T04 and AC-T07-4 from ACCEPTANCE.md.

user_stories.title: [MTI-28] Duplicate signals within 5-minute window are idempotent
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: Send same BTI_VIOLATION signal 3 times within 5min -> score changes only once. Third send does not compound the penalty. Dedup window configurable (default 5 min). AC-T04-4.

evidence.notes: AC-T04-4 from ACCEPTANCE.md.

user_stories.title: [MTI-29] Failed signals are dead-lettered and logged for operator investigation
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: Malformed signal -> DLQ entry created with raw payload + error message + timestamp. Health endpoint still returns 200. DLQ count visible in App Insights custom metric. AC-T04-5.

evidence.notes: AC-T04-5 from ACCEPTANCE.md.

user_stories.title: [MTI-30] Signal pipeline failure does not crash the Trust Service
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: Kill the async recompute worker process -> /health still returns 200. POST /trust/signal still accepts and returns 202 (buffered). Service recovers automatically when worker restarts.

evidence.notes: AC-T04-5 resilience dimension.

user_stories.title: [MTI-31] Signal processing isolated from in-flight evaluateTrust calls (no race conditions)
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: Concurrent test: send signal while 50 evaluateTrust calls in-flight -> no race condition, no shared mutable state. Thread-safety verified. evaluateTrust responses consistent.

evidence.notes: Stateless compute design prevents most races; verify Cosmos write isolation.

user_stories.title: [MTI-32] POST /trust/getDecision chains through 9-step Decision Engine and returns decision + obligations
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: Integration test with 19-ai-gov: full context envelope -> response includes decision=ALLOW|DENY, obligations[], reasons[], trustBand, compositeMti. p95 <= 200ms.

evidence.notes: Calls 19-ai-gov Decision Engine at step 5. Requires 19-ai-gov runtime deployed.

user_stories.title: [MTI-33] correlationId round-tripped in every Trust Service request and response
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: Trace test: request.correlationId == response.correlationId for evaluateTrust, getDecision, getActorTrust. Correlation visible in App Insights distributed trace linking brain-v2 -> Trust Service calls.

evidence.notes: AC-T06-3 from ACCEPTANCE.md.

user_stories.title: [MTI-34] DENY-safe circuit breaker: Trust Service unavailability causes Decision Engine to return DENY
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: Kill Trust Service -> Decision Engine integration test -> outcome=DENY (not ALLOW, not error). Circuit breaker documented. Test verified with 19-ai-gov team. AC-T06-4.

evidence.notes: AC-T06-4 from ACCEPTANCE.md. Critical safety requirement — governance cannot be bypassed.

user_stories.title: [MTI-35] computationVersion field in every evaluateTrust response for audit traceability
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: Response field computationVersion present and non-null. Value matches the deployed Trust Service version tag. Persisted in actor_trust_scores Cosmos record. AC-T06-5.

evidence.notes: AC-T06-5 from ACCEPTANCE.md.

user_stories.title: [MTI-36] MTI snapshot in governance_evaluations (19-ai-gov) matches evaluateTrust score for same correlationId
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: Cross-container join test: governance_evaluations.mti_snapshot.compositeMti == actor_trust_scores.compositeMti for same correlationId. Verified after end-to-end Decision Engine call. AC-T03-4.

evidence.notes: AC-T03-4 from ACCEPTANCE.md.

user_stories.title: [MTI-37] 33-eva-brain-v2 BTI signal emitter: posts BTI_VIOLATION on policy violation in audit middleware
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: Integration: trigger a policy violation in brain-api (e.g. restricted operation attempted) -> BTI_VIOLATION signal posted to Trust Service -> signal visible in actor's trust log within 60s.

evidence.notes: Change in 33-eva-brain-v2 audit middleware. Needs H-handshake with brain-v2 team.

user_stories.title: [MTI-38] 33-eva-brain-v2 ARI signal emitter: posts ARI_HALLUCINATION from evaluation telemetry
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: Integration: evaluation pipeline detects hallucination_rate above threshold -> ARI_HALLUCINATION signal posted -> ARI score drops in next evaluateTrust call for that actor.

evidence.notes: Change in 33-eva-brain-v2 evaluation telemetry. Check eval pipeline in brain-v2 Sprint 7.

user_stories.title: [MTI-39] 17-apim STI emitter: posts STI_INJECTION_DETECTED on prompt injection in gateway policy
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: APIM policy change: when threat detection header triggers -> POST /trust/signal with signalType=STI_INJECTION_DETECTED -> STI signal visible in trust log within 60s.

evidence.notes: Change in 17-apim threat detection policy. Coordinate with APIM sprint.

user_stories.title: [MTI-40] 17-apim STI emitter: posts STI signal on anomaly threshold breach
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: APIM anomaly threshold breach -> STI signal posted -> STI reduced in next evaluateTrust for that actor. Signal includes source=apim-anomaly and severity.

evidence.notes: Extends APIM observability (17-apim Sprint 7 F5).

user_stories.title: [MTI-41] 40-eva-control-plane ETI emitter: posts ETI_VALIDATED when evidence pack SHA-256 validates
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: Control plane RB-001 completes evidence pack validation -> ETI_VALIDATED signal posted -> ETI increases in next evaluateTrust for the actor who submitted the evidence.

evidence.notes: Change in 40-eva-control-plane pack-evidence.py or RB-001 workflow.

user_stories.title: [MTI-42] ITI reads from Entra ID token claims at evaluate time (pull, not push signal)
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: Unit test: evaluateTrust with token containing mfa_registered=true, tou_accepted=true -> ITI computed correctly without requiring a prior push signal. Token claims are the authoritative ITI source.

evidence.notes: Pull model: 28-rbac / Entra ID token claims read at evaluate time. No webhook needed.

user_stories.title: [MTI-43] ARI signal format agreed with 36-red-teaming: Promptfoo results -> ARI signal schema
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: JSON schema for ARI signal documented in 47-eva-mti/specs/ari-signal-schema.json. Accepted by both 36-red-teaming and 47-eva-mti teams. Schema committed to both repos.

evidence.notes: Known blocker from STATUS.md. Requires coordination with 36-red-teaming.

user_stories.title: [MTI-44] ARI calculator consumes agreed red team evaluation results format
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: Integration test: Promptfoo evaluation result in agreed format -> ARI signal ingested -> ARI calculator test passes. Result file format validated against ari-signal-schema.json.

evidence.notes: Depends on MTI-43 (schema agreement).

user_stories.title: [MTI-45] Trust Dashboard screen at /admin/trust/dashboard with score distribution and signal volume
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: AdminListPage<TrustSummary> renders. Band distribution pie chart correct. Signal volume bar chart by type (last 24h). jest-axe 0 violations. EN/FR i18n. 10+ vitest tests passing. Registered in 37-data-model.

evidence.notes: New screen in 31-eva-faces admin-face. Follows AdminListPage template pattern.

user_stories.title: [MTI-46] Trust Dashboard: top 5 actors by trust change (rising and falling) panel
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: Dashboard shows top-5 trust rising and top-5 trust falling actors by delta in last 24h. Data from GET /trust/signals aggregation. Updates on 60s poll. EN/FR labels.

evidence.notes: Requires aggregation query on actor_trust_scores Cosmos container.

user_stories.title: [MTI-47] Actor Trust Profile screen at /admin/trust/actors/{actorId}
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: Screen renders 6-subscore bar chart, composite MTI, trust band badge, 30-day sparkline. 8+ vitest tests. jest-axe 0 violations. EN/FR. Uses GET /trust/getActorTrust?history=true. Registered in 37-data-model.

evidence.notes: Route: /admin/trust/actors/:actorId. Dynamic param in react-router-dom.

user_stories.title: [MTI-48] Actor Trust Profile: signal log panel showing last 50 signals for the actor
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: Signal log panel on actor profile. Filter by signalType. Sort by timestamp desc. Shows signalType, value, source, timestamp. EN/FR column headers. Pagination.

evidence.notes: Panel within the actor profile screen. Uses GET /trust/signals?actorId=x&limit=50.

user_stories.title: [MTI-49] Trust Signal Log screen at /admin/trust/signals with all-actor log and filter/pagination
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: AdminListPage<TrustSignal> with filter by signalType, actorId, dateRange. Pagination. 8+ vitest tests. jest-axe 0 violations. EN/FR. Registered in 37-data-model.

evidence.notes: Route: /admin/trust/signals. Uses GET /trust/signals with query params.

user_stories.title: [MTI-50] Signal Log: DLQ visibility tab showing failed signals with raw payload
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: DLQ tab on Signal Log screen. Count badge on tab. Shows malformed signals: signalType, errorReason, rawPayload (truncated), timestamp. Admin-only visibility.

evidence.notes: DLQ data from GET /trust/signals/dlq (new endpoint — register in 37-data-model).

user_stories.title: [MTI-51] Trust Band Config screen at /admin/trust/config: read-only band thresholds and weight tables
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: Screen shows band thresholds (5 rows), weight tables per actor type (4 tables), computationVersion. Read-only. TRUST_ADMIN role gated. EN/FR. 3+ vitest tests. Registered in 37-data-model.

evidence.notes: Route: /admin/trust/config. Uses GET /trust/config endpoint (register in 37-data-model).

user_stories.title: [MTI-52] Agent Fleet Trust Overview at /admin/trust/agents: all AGENT actors sorted by trust band
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: AdminListPage<AgentTrustSummary>. UNTRUSTED agents at top. Shows agentId, composite MTI, ARI, trustBand, lastEvaluated. Link to actor profile. 6+ vitest tests. EN/FR. Registered in 37-data-model.

evidence.notes: Route: /admin/trust/agents. Filters actor_trust_scores by actorType=AGENT.

user_stories.title: [MTI-53] Register all 5 trust admin screens in 37-data-model (PUT + write cycle)
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: GET /model/screens returns 5 trust screens: TrustDashboard, ActorTrustProfile, TrustSignalLog, TrustBandConfig, AgentFleetTrust. Write cycle exits 0. validate-model PASS.

evidence.notes: 5-step write cycle per copilot-instructions.

user_stories.title: [MTI-54] Register all Trust Service API calls made from admin screens in 37-data-model
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: GET /trust/signals, GET /trust/signals/dlq, GET /trust/config registered as endpoints in 37-data-model with owner=47-eva-mti. Write cycle exits 0.

evidence.notes: Adds 3 endpoints beyond the original 4 in the OpenAPI spec.

user_stories.title: [MTI-55] TrustBandIndicator shared component exported from @eva/ui
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: Component exported from @eva/ui. Props: trustBand, compositeMti, subscores(optional). Renders chip/badge with band label + GC-token colour. Tooltip shows 6 subscores on hover/focus. Storybook story added. TypeScript explicit return type.

evidence.notes: New component in 31-eva-faces/shared/eva-ui/. Follows existing EvaXxx wrapper pattern.

user_stories.title: [MTI-56] TrustBandIndicator WCAG 2.1 AA: forced-colors, aria-label, keyboard accessible
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: jest-axe 0 violations. @media (forced-colors: active) block in makeStyles using only system keywords. aria-label includes full band name (e.g. 'Trust band: TRUSTED, score 78'). Tab-reachable tooltip.

evidence.notes: Follows forced-colors pattern from PRD-REBUILD-FLUENT-V9.md ground rules.

user_stories.title: [MTI-57] Chat-face: TrustBandIndicator per chat message alongside citation
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: TrustBandIndicator rendered in ChatMessage component. Source: MTI trust band from brain-api response (header or body field). Renders correctly for all 5 bands. EN/FR band labels. 3+ vitest tests.

evidence.notes: Requires brain-api to return trustBand in chat response. Handshake with 33-eva-brain-v2 team.

user_stories.title: [MTI-58] Portal-face: current user trust band in NavHeader / profile area
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: TrustBandIndicator visible in portal-face header. Reads from AuthContext trust claim or GET /trust/getActorTrust/{myActorId}. Updates on AuthContext change. EN/FR. 2+ vitest tests.

evidence.notes: Change in 31-eva-faces portal-face NavHeader.tsx.

user_stories.title: [MTI-59] Portal-face trust indicator links to Actor Trust Profile if TRUST_READER role
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: If user has TRUST_READER permission (via usePermissions), trust indicator in portal header links to /admin/trust/actors/{actorId}. Without role: indicator is display-only, no link. PermissionGate used.

evidence.notes: Uses PermissionGate and usePermissions from portal-face AuthContext (WI-19).

user_stories.title: [MTI-60] OTel span per /evaluateTrust call with correlationId as custom property
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: Each /evaluateTrust call produces an OTel span in App Insights with correlation_id, actorId (hashed), actorType, trustBand as custom properties. Span visible in App Insights Transaction Search.

evidence.notes: No raw actorId in telemetry (Lane A logging -- hash 16 chars). Uses opentelemetry-sdk.

user_stories.title: [MTI-61] Subscore computation durations as custom metrics in App Insights
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: Custom metrics: trust_iti_ms, trust_bti_ms, trust_cti_ms, trust_eti_ms, trust_sti_ms, trust_ari_ms visible in Log Analytics workspace. Each metric has actorType dimension.

evidence.notes: Helps identify slow signal sources in production.

user_stories.title: [MTI-62] KQL Workbook with 5 panels: score distribution, band transitions, signal volume, DLQ trend, p95 latency
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: Workbook deployed to marco-sandbox-appinsights. 5 panels all functional with live data. Shared link accessible to AICOE team. Refresh interval <= 5 min.

evidence.notes: Follows KQL library pattern from 33-eva-brain-v2 Sprint 7 F5.

user_stories.title: [MTI-63] x-eva-* APIM cost attribution headers on all Trust Service calls from brain-v2
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: Trust Service calls made by brain-v2 carry x-eva-project-id=47-eva-mti, x-eva-sprint, x-eva-wi-tag. Headers visible in APIM access logs. CostTags include phase=mti, task=evaluateTrust.

evidence.notes: Follows CostTags pattern from 33-eva-brain-v2 (x-eva-* headers in all routes).

user_stories.title: [MTI-64] Trust Service costs visible in 14-az-finops Power BI report
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: Azure Cost Management shows cost tag eva-mti on Container App resource consumption. Tag appears in Power BI 14-az-finops report under project=47-eva-mti business unit.

evidence.notes: Resource tag: project=eva-mti applied on Container App creation.

user_stories.title: [MTI-65] GitHub Actions CI/CD: test -> build -> ACR push -> Container App deploy on PR merge
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: .github/workflows/ci.yml exists. pytest exits 0 -> docker build -> push to marcosandacr20260203.azurecr.io/eva-trust-service:latest -> az containerapp update. Workflow runs on push to main.

evidence.notes: Follows pattern from 33-eva-brain-v2 and 37-data-model ACR builds.

user_stories.title: [MTI-66] evidence_id propagated to ACR tag, Container App label, and ADO artifact
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: evidence_id format: GH{run}-PR{pr}-{sha}. Present in: ACR image tag, Container App revision label, ADO artifact link on the PBI. Visible in 40-eva-control-plane /evidence/{evidence_id}.

evidence.notes: Follows 40-eva-control-plane evidence spine pattern.

user_stories.title: [MTI-67] ARI signal format agreed and documented; Promptfoo results ingested reliably
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: docs/specs/ari-signal-schema.json committed. Validated by 36-red-teaming team. ARI calculator test with real Promptfoo output format passes. Integration test end-to-end.

evidence.notes: Depends on MTI-43. Sprint-6 is the final integration verification sprint.

user_stories.title: [MTI-68] Azure Monitor alerts: availability < 99.5% and /evaluateTrust p95 > 150ms
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: Two alert rules deployed via Bicep. Alert fires in staging simulation. Actionable notification sent (Teams or email). Alert names follow eva-mti naming convention.

evidence.notes: AC-T07 non-functional requirements from ACCEPTANCE.md.

user_stories.title: [MTI-69] Trust Service availability SLA: >= 99.5% over 30 days verified in staging
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: Chaos test: Container App restart -> health probe recovers within 60s. Availability metric in App Insights >= 99.5% over 30-day staging run. Azure Monitor availability alert verified.

evidence.notes: AC-T07-5 from ACCEPTANCE.md.
